formLoadFailureDialog.header.title.string: An error occurred while loading this form
formLoadFailureDialog.header.title.comment: The title text shown in the header of the dialog.

formLoadFailureDialog.details.label.comment: The label for the clickable summary that reveals technical error information.

odkWebForm.submit.label.comment: Label for the primary form submission button.

odkWebForm.validation.error.string: {count, plural, one {# question with error} other {# questions with errors}}
odkWebForm.validation.error.comment: Error banner message. {count} is the number of validation violations.

odkWebForm.geolocation.error.string: Location unavailable. Enable GPS and browser permissions, then restart the form to try again.
odkWebForm.geolocation.error.comment: Error message shown when background geolocation fails.
